base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bowser_fire_breath — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1985 super mario bros. 2-frame alternating fire-mouth emission. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 2-frame alternating fire-mouth emission; long horizontal flame that persists for ~40 frames per breath event
